caption: The video features a man standing behind a podium, delivering a speech. He is dressed in a bright yellow traditional outfit with a red and white shawl draped over his shoulders. The background displays a colorful illustration of architectural structures and natural elements, suggesting a cultural or historical theme. The man gestures with his right hand, emphasizing points as he speaks, while his left hand rests on the podium. His expression is engaged and animated, indicating that he is addressing an audience with passion and conviction. The setting appears to be a formal event or ceremony, possibly related to heritage or community celebration.
